user.title: Traeger WiFIRE
user.description: Sign in with your Traeger account

data.client_id: AWS Cognito Client ID (Optional - leave blank to use default)

data_description.client_id: Advanced: Only change this if instructed to use a different CLIENT_ID due to Traeger API changes. Leave blank to use the default CLIENT_ID.

error.auth: Invalid username or password. If authentication continues to fail with error 400, Traeger may have changed their CLIENT_ID. Check https://github.com/johnvoipguy/Traeger-WiFire/issues for updates.
